SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-17-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ANDREA CAMILLE CALVIN. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALVIN, ANDREA CAMILLE AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALVIN, ANDREA CAMILLE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. DEFENDANT HAS NO CONTROL OVER THE CONDUCT OF HOSTS LIKE 1861 NORTH WEST PAMPANA BEACH, FLORIDA. DEFENDANT PROVIDES AN ONLINE PLATFORM THRU WHICH HOSTS MAY CREATE LISTINGS AND GUESTS, LIKE PLAINTIFF, MAY BOOK ACCOMMODATIONS DIRECTLY WITH HOSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CALVIN, ANDREA CAMILLE
